Definition (EN): A use case definition is a kind of case definition (see 7.22 ) that specifies the required behavior of its subject relative to one or more external actors. The objective of the use case is to provide an observable result of value to one or more of its actors.
Context/Example (EN): A use case definition is a kind of case definition (see 7.22 ) that specifies the required behavior of its subject relative to one or more external actors. The objective of the use case is to provide an observable result of value to one or more of its actors.

Definition (EN): A use case usage is a case usage that is a usage of a use case.
Context/Example (EN): A use case usage is a case usage that is a usage of a use case.

Definition (EN): A case definition or usage may also have one or more actor parameters that represent roles played by an entity external to the subject of the case but necessary to the specification of the case.
Context/Example (EN): A case definition or usage may also have one or more actor parameters that represent roles played by an entity external to the subject of the case but necessary to the specification of the case.

Equivalent (JP): インクルードユースケース使用
Definition (EN): An include use case usage is a use case usage that is also a kind of perform action usage (see 7.17 ).
Context/Example (EN): An include use case usage is a use case usage that is also a kind of perform action usage (see 7.17 ).

Equivalent (JP): インクルードされるユースケース
Definition (EN): A use case definition or usage may contain an include use case usage to specify that the behavior of the containing use case includes the behavior of the included use case.
Context/Example (EN): A use case definition or usage may contain an include use case usage to specify that the behavior of the containing use case includes the behavior of the included use case.

Definition (EN): If a given subject also has a design model that decomposes its internal structure, then it should be possible to construct an interaction of the internal parts of the subject, consistent with the design model, that can be shown to be a specialization of the behavior specified by the performance of the use case for that subject. This is known as a realization of the use case relative to the design model.
Context/Example (EN): This is known as a realization of the use case relative to the design model.

Definition (EN): A use case definition or usage is declared as a case definition or usage (see 7.22.2 ), using the kind keyword use case.
Context/Example (EN): A use case definition or usage is declared as a case definition or usage (see 7.22.2 ), using the kind keyword use case.

Definition (EN): The subject of an included use case usage is bound by default to the subject of its containing use case definition or usage.
Context/Example (EN): The subject of an included use case usage is bound by default to the subject of its containing use case definition or usage.

Definition (EN): An include use case usage may also be declared using just the keyword include instead of include use case.
Context/Example (EN): An include use case usage may also be declared using just the keyword include instead of include use case.
